## User outcome

<!-- What becomes safer, clearer, or possible? -->

## Contract impact

- [ ] No command/schema/deep-link change
- [ ] Contract change is versioned and documented
- [ ] Manual/no-LLM path remains usable
- [ ] AI/external writes remain editable and reviewable
- [ ] Unknown data remains unknown

## Evidence

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Compose/device test where UI changed
- [ ] Empty/populated/error/large-font states checked where relevant
- [ ] No personal data, receipt image, health data, credentials, or local database included
